description_long: This is a large rectangular cardboard shipping box, commonly used for parcel delivery in urban environments. The front face features a USPS Priority Mail shipping label with a barcode and address details, indicating it has been processed for shipment. One side of the box displays a red 'THIS WAY UP' symbol with two arrows, providing handling instructions. Another side shows a visible stain or mark, suggesting the box has been handled or exposed to moisture. The surface is made of brown corrugated cardboard, with visible seams and a slightly rough texture. The box appears sealed and intact, suitable for containing and protecting items during transit.
description: A large brown cardboard shipping box with a USPS Priority Mail label, handling symbols, and visible wear marks.
description_view_0: The front view shows the USPS Priority Mail shipping label with barcode and address details.
description_view_1: This side displays a plain cardboard surface with a noticeable stain or mark.
description_view_2: This view features a red 'THIS WAY UP' symbol with two arrows printed on the cardboard.
description_view_3: A plain, unmarked cardboard surface is visible from this angle.
